use_cases: Displays animated placeholder content while data loads to improve perceived performance
Provides visual feedback during async operations in lists, cards, or text blocks
Prevents layout shift by reserving space before content renders
Enhances UX with smooth gradient animation during loading states
Works as a wrapper around child components to show loading state without structural changes
ai_summary: A versatile skeleton loading component that displays animated gradient placeholder content to indicate loading states. Supports customizable dimensions, multiple shape variants (pill, rounded, squared), and smooth gradient animations for improved perceived performance and reduced layout shift during async operations.
